title: Snakemake rna-seq template
author: Aurelien Ginolhac
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: RNA-seq analysis with Snakemake    Snakemake  is a workflow manager system for  creating reproducible and scalable pipelines.     This repository allows you to perform a  *RNA-seq analysis* , from raw reads to differential expression and is customised  from  this template  by  Johannes Köster .  Reads can be supplied either as  single-end  or  paired-end  and optionally with technical replicates.  Sequencing files from technical replicates are merged at the mapping step  See full description there  https://gitlab.lcsb.uni.lu/aurelien.ginolhac/snakemake-rna-seq

Reads can be supplied either as  single-end  or  paired-end  and optionally with technical replicates.  Sequencing files from technical replicates are merged at the mapping step  See full description there  https://gitlab.lcsb.uni.lu/aurelien.ginolhac/snakemake-rna-seq
